name: DLL Injection via Suspicious Process
description: Detects DLL injection attempts using rundll32 or suspicious injection patterns
query:
// Detect DLL injection via rundll32 or injection tools
// Trigger on suspicious DLL loading patterns
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(rundll32.*DllRegisterServer|mavinject|inject.*\.dll|Invoke-DllInjection)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
